steps.name: stop_model_for_step6_15
steps.output_tail:
Container infra-model-service-1 Stopping 
 Container infra-model-service-1 Stopped

steps.name: start_model_after_step6_15
steps.output_tail:
Container infra-model-service-1 Starting 
 Container infra-model-service-1 Started

steps.name: step9_fault
steps.command: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml stop model-service && python3 scripts/test_step9_observability.py --mode fault && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml start model-service
steps.output_tail:
STEP9_GATE_PASS
 Container infra-model-service-1 Stopping 
 Container infra-model-service-1 Stopped 
 Container infra-model-service-1 Starting 
 Container infra-model-service-1 Started

steps.name: step7_reliability
steps.command: python3 scripts/setup_rabbitmq.py --api http://localhost:15672/api --user guest --password guest >/tmp/spt_step18_setup_rabbitmq.log && python3 services/dispatch_worker.py --api http://localhost:15672/api --user guest --password guest --max-retry 2 --max-cycles 240 >/tmp/spt_step18_worker.log 2>&1 & WORKER_PID=$!; sleep 1; python3 scripts/test_step7_mq_reliability.py --rabbit-api http://localhost:15672/api --user guest --password guest --gateway http://localhost:8080; kill $WORKER_PID >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; wait $WORKER_PID 2>/dev/null || true

steps.name: step8_fallback
steps.command: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml stop realtime-service && python3 scripts/test_step8_realtime_channel.py --mode fallback --ws-host localhost --ws-port 8090 --ws-path /ws/status --poll-url http://localhost:8080/api/v1/admin/realtime/status && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml start realtime-service
steps.output_tail:
STEP8_GATE_PASS
 Container infra-realtime-service-1 Stopping 
 Container infra-realtime-service-1 Stopped 
 Container infra-realtime-service-1 Starting 
 Container infra-realtime-service-1 Started
